name: Debug and Fix Buggy Code
description: Given intentionally buggy code, identify and fix the issues. Tests debugging ability and code comprehension.
prompt:
The shopping-cart.ts file has 3 bugs that cause the tests to fail. Your task:

1. Run the tests to see which ones fail: `npm test`
2. Identify the 3 bugs in shopping-cart.ts
3. Fix each bug
4. Verify all tests pass

Do NOT rewrite the entire file. Make minimal, targeted fixes to the existing code.

Hints:
- Bug 1 is in addItem() - look at the find condition
- Bug 2 is in removeItem() - look at splice usage
- Bug 3 is in getTotal() - look at floating point precision
context: This tests debugging ability. The bugs are common JavaScript mistakes. Focus on identifying the exact issues and making minimal fixes.

tests.name: Bug 2 fixed - splice with delete count

qualityChecks.name: Minimal changes made
qualityChecks.command: git diff --stat shopping-cart.ts 2>/dev/null | tail -1 || echo '0 files changed'

author: PopKit Team
